title: Chromatic Creations
description: A Create modpack focused around building and farming.
body:
Chromatic Creations is a modpack centered around Create, plus a few Create addons and some storage mods like Sohpisticated Storage to go along with that. It includes mods to enhance farming and food such as Farmers Delight, Farmers Expanse, and Vegan Delight. There are also some decorative mods to help with building like Macaw's Furniture.
There are also many of the usual performance enhancing and quality-of-life mods like Sodium, Lithium, Iris, Jade, and EMI.
